name: Bevacizumab (Avastin)
dose_regimen_cited: Metastatic colorectal cancer, first-line, in combination with intravenous 5-FU-based chemotherapy (IFL regimen): 5 mg/kg IV every 14 days. (Avastin label also lists 10 mg/kg q14d and 15 mg/kg q21d for other indications/regimens; 5 mg/kg q14d mCRC regimen was used as the cited figure.)

wac_source.description: Genentech Colorado HB 19-1131 price disclosure: Avastin 100 mg/4 mL vial, WAC package price $796.94 per vial ($199.235/mL), sourced from AnalySource/First Databank, accessed 2026-07-16

name: Trastuzumab (Herceptin)
dose_regimen_cited: Metastatic breast cancer, weekly schedule maintenance dose: initial (loading) dose of 4 mg/kg IV, followed by subsequent weekly doses of 2 mg/kg IV until disease progression. 2 mg/kg (weekly maintenance rate) was used as the cited figure; the label also offers a 3-weekly schedule (8 mg/kg loading, 6 mg/kg q3w) as an alternative regimen.

wac_source.description: Genentech Colorado HB 19-1131 price disclosure: Herceptin 150 mg vial, WAC package/unit price $1,558.42 per vial, sourced from AnalySource/First Databank, accessed 2026-07-16

name: Rituximab (Rituxan)
dose_regimen_cited: Relapsed or refractory, low-grade or follicular, CD20-positive B-cell Non-Hodgkin's Lymphoma (NHL): 375 mg/m2 IV once weekly for 4 or 8 doses. (Label also lists a 375 mg/m2 x1 dose regimen for previously untreated follicular NHL in combination with CVP chemotherapy, and CLL dosing on a different schedule; 375 mg/m2 weekly NHL regimen was used as the cited figure.)

wac_source.description: Genentech Colorado HB 19-1131 price disclosure: Rituxan 100 mg/10 mL vial, WAC package price $939.52 per vial ($93.952/mL); 500 mg/50 mL vial WAC package price $4,697.60. Sourced from AnalySource/First Databank, accessed 2026-07-16

name: Cetuximab (Erbitux)
dose_regimen_cited: Weekly maintenance dosage for colorectal cancer / squamous cell carcinoma of the head and neck: initial dose 400 mg/m2 IV, followed by 250 mg/m2 IV weekly. 250 mg/m2 (weekly maintenance rate) was used as the cited figure; label also lists a biweekly regimen (500 mg/m2 every 2 weeks) as an alternative.

wac_source.description: Eli Lilly Colorado HB 19-1131 price disclosure: Erbitux 100 mg vial WAC $836.49; 200 mg vial WAC $1,672.98. Sourced from AnalySource/First Databank (accessed by Lilly 07/02/2025); document accessed 2026-07-16

name: Panitumumab (Vectibix)
dose_regimen_cited: Metastatic colorectal cancer (wild-type RAS), monotherapy or in combination with FOLFOX: 6 mg/kg IV every 14 days.

wac_source.reason: WAC not publicly available. Extensive search (Amgen Colorado HB 19-1131 disclosure pages, AnalySource/First Databank citations, drugs.com price guide, state Medicaid pharmacy pricing files) did not surface a true WAC figure for Vectibix; only ASP-based reimbursement figures (e.g., buyandbill.com J9303 pages) and cash/discount pricing were found, which were excluded per instructions not to substitute cash/self-pay prices for WAC.
